models.name: Random Forest
models.blurb: Asks hundreds of small yes/no questions about the address and votes on the answer.

models.name: Logistic Regression
models.blurb: A straightforward formula that weighs each clue once. Fast, but less flexible.

models.name: Gradient Boosting
models.blurb: Builds on its own mistakes step by step. Powerful, a bit slower to train.
